entryPoints.purpose: Developer command entry point for EAS sideload and simulator builds
responsibilities: Expose ios:ipa as eas build --platform ios --profile sideload --non-interactive
Expose ios:simulator as eas build --platform ios --profile development --non-interactive
Keep remote EAS builds separate from the local check quality gate

entryPoints.purpose: EAS Build profile configuration for simulator, sideload, and production builds
responsibilities: Require EAS CLI >= 15.0.0 and remote app version source
Define development iOS simulator build profile
Define sideload iOS device build profile with withoutCredentials: true, simulator: false, and config: unsigned-ios.yml
Keep production profile empty for future signed distribution configuration

services.purpose: Custom EAS Build workflow that produces unsigned iOS device IPA artifacts without Apple credential restore
responsibilities: Check out source with eas/checkout
Install JavaScript dependencies with eas/install_node_modules
Resolve EAS build configuration with eas/resolve_build_config
Generate the native iOS project with eas/prebuild
Install CocoaPods dependencies in ./ios
Detect the Xcode scheme from xcodebuild -list -json
Run xcodebuild against spot.xcworkspace for iphoneos Release with code signing disabled
Package the built .app into Payload/ and zip unsigned.ipa
Upload unsigned.ipa with eas/upload_artifact

configurations.purpose: Expo app manifest consumed by EAS prebuild and the native iOS project generation
responsibilities: Declare expo.name and expo.slug as spot
Declare ios.bundleIdentifier as com.izkizk8.spot
Declare ios.infoPlist.ITSAppUsesNonExemptEncryption as false
Declare expo.extra.eas.projectId for the linked EAS project

documentation.purpose: Accepted ADR for the unsigned IPA custom EAS build decision
responsibilities: Record that withoutCredentials: true only suppresses the local prompt and does not skip remote credential restore
Record the decision to use .eas/build/unsigned-ios.yml for the sideload profile
Document rejected alternatives including standard pipeline plus withoutCredentials, paid Apple Developer Program, simulator-only builds, and Expo Go-only testing
Summarize consequences including free Apple ID limits and EAS revalidation needs
Link to docs/_howto/sideload-iphone.md as the operator walkthrough

documentation.purpose: Curated operator walkthrough for building, downloading, re-signing, installing, trusting, and re-signing an unsigned IPA
responsibilities: Document prerequisites for Windows, iPhone, Sideloadly, iTunes, and EAS login
Document pnpm ios:ipa as the unsigned IPA build command
Document download steps from expo.dev
Document Sideloadly re-sign and USB install flow
Document trust and recurring re-sign steps for free Apple ID installs
Document troubleshooting and free Apple ID limitations

documentation.purpose: Generated module profile for the EAS sideload configuration and workflow
responsibilities: Summarize business context and current decision
Inventory scripts, EAS profiles, app configuration, workflow, dependencies, and risks
Link to docs/_howto/sideload-iphone.md and ADR 0003 instead of duplicating curated operational detail

documentation.purpose: Generated structured file index for the EAS sideload module
responsibilities: Classify module source-of-truth and generated documentation files by component role
Record file responsibilities and dependencies
Provide machine-readable module context for future repo indexing
Document the current custom unsigned IPA build workflow
Document only current ADR and how-to links
Point operational readers to docs/_howto/sideload-iphone.md

generatedOutputs.purpose: JSON module file index regenerated on 2026-04-28
responsibilities: Remain valid JSON
Represent current source-of-truth files
Represent current source-of-truth files without legacy guide references
